name: yxj-paper-ppg-runtime
description: Codex-native paper production graph runtime: explicit material graph, local backpropagation, and main-agent dispatch.

interface.shortDescription: Manage paper production as a visible material graph.
interface.longDescription: A planning-first Codex plugin scaffold for academic paper production using explicit material graphs, local backpropagation, validation, and main-agent dispatch.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use yxj-paper-ppg-runtime to design or inspect a paper production graph.
